results.title: Regis lifts 2027 production guidance
results.description: Having met the top-end of its yearly guidance for 2026 and as it advances an underground development project, ASX-listed Regis Resources has increased its 2027 yearly production guidance to between 360 000 oz and 400 000 oz. The company's 2026 production came to 379 000 oz - just shy of the year's top-end of guidance of 380 000 oz.

results.title: Ambest unit purchases Penang shophouse for RM1.95mil
results.description: PETALING JAYA: Ambest Group Bhd's wholly-owned subsidiary Ambest Technology Sdn Bhd has agreed to buy a two-storey shophouse property in Permatang Damar Laut, Penang for RM1.95mil.
